projectDescription: A modern web and desktop app for managing digital sticky notes with cloud sync, checklists, rich customization, and voice input.
keyFeatures: Create, edit, and delete sticky notes with titles, content, colors, and statuses
Drag-and-drop note reordering in grid or list view
Note statuses: To-Do, Doing, Done, Backlog
Pin important notes to the top
Checklists inside notes with nested task support
Voice input to create and edit notes
Real-time full-text search across content, titles, colors, and statuses
Automatic URL detection in note content
Cloud sync via Supabase with note content encryption
Export/import all notes and data as JSON
Desktop app via Tauri (Windows, macOS, Linux)
publicApiSurface: Note CRUD: createNote, getNotes, updateNote, deleteNote
Note statuses: To-Do | Doing | Done | Backlog
Note colors: yellow, pink, blue, green, purple, orange, teal, lavender, peach, mint
Voice commands: new note, edit note, show archived
Keyboard shortcuts: N (new note), Alt+P (quick note window)
Font settings: basic fonts, handwriting fonts, favorite fonts
